task_description: Implement Phase 1-3 of the architecture refactor: create 5 fat methodology files in core/methodology/ as single source of truth, rewire .kiro/ agents to be thin wrappers, and add cherry-picked tools/experiments/README updates.

verification.summary: All 5 methodology files created (466+300+492+465+451 lines). All 5 agent files thinned to under 25 lines each with #[[file:]] references. tools/validate-song.py runs correctly (valid Python, --help works, correctly detects failures in test files, exits with code 1 on failure). experiments/suno/ directory created with README and TEMPLATE.yml. Suno Version Status table added to references/SUNO_STYLE_GENRE_REFERENCE.md. README.md updated with 'Using Without Kiro' section.
